textPlain: One can talk about about the technical side of writing a code formatter, but what about the ethical side? Automatically formatted code looks kind of okay but never great. Uniformity for the sake of uniformity. It is not a very humanistic.

> That handful of code took me almost a year to write.Formatting can be tough.  See Knuth's extensive bug list for TEX from 1987 at https://yurichev.com/mirrors/knuth1989.pdf to see the kind of tarpit one can get trapped in.
